description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a boxy, rectangular shape and a prominent convex glass screen. The casing is primarily off-white with a contrasting dark gray or black front bezel and a large, protruding back housing, likely for the cathode ray tube. Two long, thin metal antennas extend from the top, giving it a classic retro appearance. The front panel features a green-tinted screen, a wooden accent area with ventilation slats, and a set of rotary dials and push buttons for manual control. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, except for ventilation grilles and mounting screws. The television stands on four small feet, slightly elevating it above the surface.
description: A retro, box-shaped television with a convex glass screen, off-white casing, black bezel, and twin metal antennas. The front features a green screen, wood accent, and manual control dials.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large, dark back housing and the base of the twin antennas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the back housing and the smooth, off-white side panel.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the green-tinted screen, wood accent panel, control dials, and antennas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the off-white side and the protruding back.
attribute_bezel_design: Thick black plastic bezel with a matte finish and rounded corners.
attribute_control_button_layout: Cluster of rotary dials and push buttons on the lower right front panel.
